heroSubhead: Defensive driving, heavy-vehicle, surface mobile equipment and agriculture operator training — with real assessment and certification, from our base in Makeni. On the ground for Sierra Rutile, Sierra Tropical, DADTCO Mozambique and more.
programmesHeading: Training for every class of vehicle.
programmesIntro: Seven specialised programmes — each pairing classroom theory with practical, on-vehicle training and ending in certification.
certPathHeading: From classroom to certificate — nothing skipped.
certPathIntro: Every SierraZim driver and operator follows the same disciplined route. Certification is earned, not handed out.

certPathSteps.title: Classroom & theory
certPathSteps.body: Road-safety rules, regulations, pre-start checks and vehicle knowledge, taught orally and theoretically.

certPathSteps.title: Practical training
certPathSteps.body: Hands-on vehicle control and the technical driving and operating skills for each vehicle class.

certPathSteps.title: Skills assessment
certPathSteps.body: Technical skills are assessed against high international standards before anyone progresses.

certPathSteps.title: Certification
certPathSteps.body: Issued only when a candidate has fully completed the programme and passed theory and practical.

whyUsHeading: Training built for the work, not the certificate alone.
whyUsIntro: We train the way the job is actually done — on real vehicles and equipment, to standards employers can rely on.
workHeading: Trusted to deliver, on site and across borders.
galleryHeading: Real vehicles. Real ground. Real results.
statementQuote: We don’t just train drivers — we develop people. Alongside national and development partners, SierraZim builds hands-on, market-driven skills that put young people into real, productive work.

stats.label: Countries delivered in — Sierra Leone, Mozambique & Côte d’Ivoire
Assessed before we certify — theory and practical
